query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.avg_score, c.total_reviews FROM contractors c WHERE c.id = 30001;
SELECT id, contractor_id, rating, comment FROM contractor_reviews WHERE contractor_id = 30001;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.avg_score, c.total_reviews FROM contractors c WHERE c.id = 30001;
SELECT id, contractor_id, rating, comment FROM contractor_reviews WHERE contractor_id = 30001;

rows.total_reviews: Excellent work on our electrical rewiring project. Professional, on time, and compliant with all AS/NZS 3000 standards.
